Description: Various programs for int'l students to study in Germany. Focus on academic excellence and professional experience.
What_It_Covers: €934/month stipend, travel, health insurance, tuition fees
Special_Requirements: Min. 2 years professional experience, excellent grades
Notes: Check specific program deadlines on the DAAD portal.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Integrated international study programs run by consortia of EU universities.
Special_Requirements: Cannot have lived in EU for more than 12 months in last 5 years
Notes: Apply directly to the specific program, not to a general portal.

Description: Merit-based scholarship for students at German universities, funded by government and private businesses.
Special_Requirements: Academic excellence, personal qualifications (e.g., volunteer work)
Notes: Apply through your university's website, not a central portal.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: For students worldwide with excellent grades who align with the green-political values of the foundation.
What_It_Covers: €934 per month for Master's students, plus various allowances
Special_Requirements: Political and social engagement in line with foundation values (environment, democracy, human rights). Must be enrolled in Germany.
Notes: Requires proof of social/political activism. Strong motivation letter needed.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: For international students and graduates who demonstrate strong academic merit and political/social engagement.
Special_Requirements: Above-average academic performance, broad general education, active volunteer work
Notes: For students aligned with conservative political values. Strong interview performance required.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Supports highly qualified international students who promote social democracy and political engagement.
Special_Requirements: Excellent academic record, socio-political engagement, personal suitability
Notes: For students aligned with social democratic values. Knowledge of German required (B2 level).
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Various merit-based and need-based scholarships for international degree students at TUM.
What_It_Covers: Varies: One-time grants, partial tuition support, or monthly stipends
Special_Requirements: Enrollment at TUM, excellent grades, financial need (for some programs)
Notes: Must be enrolled or applying to a degree program at TUM.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Various funding options for international students, including the Deutschlandstipendium and merit scholarships.
Special_Requirements: Enrollment at HU Berlin, excellent academic achievement
Notes: Check the HU Berlin scholarship database regularly for new offers.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Merit-based scholarships for excellent international students in engineering and science programs.
What_It_Covers: Tuition fee waivers, monthly stipends (amount varies)
Special_Requirements: Outstanding academic achievement, admission to an RWTH Master's program
Application_Deadline: Varies by program (Often with admission deadline)
Notes: One of Germany's top universities for engineering. Highly competitive.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: For students from developing countries pursuing master's degrees in development-related fields.
Feild_Of_Study: Development Studies, Social Sciences, Public Health
What_It_Covers: Covers all costs: tuition, travel, living expenses, health insurance
Special_Requirements: Citizen of a developing country, relevant professional experience, commitment to development work
Notes: Strong focus on social justice and returning to home country to apply knowledge.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Scholarship_Name: Berlin University of the Arts Scholarships
Description: Scholarships and financial aid for talented international artists and designers.
Feild_Of_Study: Fine Arts, Design, Music, Performing Arts
What_It_Covers: Varies: One-time grants or partial tuition support
Special_Requirements: Artistic talent, enrollment at UdK Berlin, portfolio assessment
Notes: Admission is highly selective based on artistic portfolio or audition.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Merit-based scholarships for international students in the MBA program.
What_It_Covers: Tuition reduction (ranges from 25% to 100% of fees)
Special_Requirements: Outstanding academic and professional background, strong application essays
Notes: One of Germany's top-ranked MBA programs. Scholarships are awarded automatically with admission.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Supports international students who are actively engaged in socio-political movements for social justice.
Special_Requirements: Proof of socio-political activism, excellent academic grades, admission to a German university
Notes: For students with left-wing political alignment. German language skills usually required (B2 level).
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Merit-based funding for highly qualified international students at Germany's oldest university.
Special_Requirements: Outstanding academic achievement, admission to a Master's program at Heidelberg University
Notes: Must be enrolled at Heidelberg University. Application is submitted after admission.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: DAAD-funded program for graduates from developing countries with professional experience.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, monthly stipend, travel, health insurance, family allowance
Special_Requirements: Min. 2 years professional experience, citizen of a developing country, bachelor's degree
Notes: Must apply directly to the specific postgraduate course's deadline.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: For international students to study and research in the USA. Funded by the U.S. government.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, airfare, living stipend, health insurance
Special_Requirements: Varies by country. Requires strong academic record and project proposal.
Notes: Applicants apply through the U.S. Embassy or Fulbright Commission in their home country.

Description: UK government's global scholarship programme for future leaders.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition fees, living allowance, travel costs to/from UK
Special_Requirements: Leadership potential, min. 2 years work experience, apply to 3 UK university courses
Notes: One of the most prestigious UK scholarships. Requires strong leadership essay.

Description: Need-based financial aid for international undergraduates. Stanford meets the full demonstrated need.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, room, board, and travel costs based on calculated need
Special_Requirements: Admitted to Stanford, demonstration of financial need
Notes: Must apply for financial aid at the same time as applying for admission.

Description: Need-based scholarships for international students. Yale meets 100% of demonstrated need without loans.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, room, board based on family's financial need
Special_Requirements: Admitted to Yale, demonstration of financial need
Notes: Application for aid does not affect admission decision.

Description: A highly selective, last-dollar scholarship for outstanding minority high school seniors.
What_It_Covers: Covers full cost of attendance not already covered by other financial aid
Special_Requirements: Pell-eligible, minority student, US citizen/national/Permanent Resident, min 3.3 GPA
Notes: Extremely competitive. Focus on leadership and community impact.

Description: Covers graduate study at Stanford for future global leaders. One of the largest fully-funded scholarships in the world.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, stipend, travel costs, and academic expenses
Special_Requirements: Exceptional leadership potential, independence of thought, civic mindset
Notes: Must apply to both Knight-Hennessy and your chosen Stanford graduate program separately.

Description: MIT is need-blind for all students and meets their full demonstrated financial need.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, room, board based on calculated family need
Special_Requirements: Admitted to MIT, demonstration of financial need
Notes: Application for financial aid does not affect admission decision.

Description: A non-degree program for experienced professionals from designated countries for leadership development.
Feild_Of_Study: Public Policy, Administration, Journalism, Law, Human Rights
What_It_Covers: Tuition, living allowance, airfare, professional development funds
Special_Requirements: Mid-career professional, demonstrated leadership, commitment to public service
Notes: This is a non-degree fellowship focused on professional enrichment, not a degree program.

Description: A non-degree program for experienced professionals from designated countries for leadership development.
Feild_Of_Study: Public Policy, Administration, Journalism, Law, Human Rights
What_It_Covers: Tuition, living allowance, airfare, professional development funds
Special_Requirements: Mid-career professional, demonstrated leadership, commitment to public service
Notes: This is a non-degree fellowship focused on professional enrichment, not a degree program.

Description: Need-based and merit-based funding for graduate and professional schools at Harvard.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, living stipend, health insurance (varies by school)
Special_Requirements: Admission to a Harvard graduate program, academic excellence
Notes: Funding offers are often made at the time of admission. Check specific school websites.

Description: Fully-funded fellowship for leaders to study peace and conflict resolution at Rotary partner universities.
Host_Country: USA, Japan, UK, Australia, Sweden, Thailand
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, room, board, round-trip transportation, internship funding
Special_Requirements: Min. 3 years related work experience, proficiency in English
Notes: For dedicated leaders working in peace and development. Strong interview required.

Description: For full-time study or research in the United States to women who are not U.S. citizens or permanent residents.
Special_Requirements: Identify as a woman, hold academic degree equivalent to U.S. bachelor’s degree
Notes: One of the largest sources of funding for women in the world.

Description: The oldest and perhaps most prestigious international scholarship program in the world.
What_It_Covers: All tuition fees, living stipend, travel to and from Oxford.
Special_Requirements: Exceptional academic achievement, leadership, commitment to service.
Notes: Applicants must be endorsed by their university. Country-specific deadlines apply.

Description: For outstanding applicants from outside the UK to pursue a full-time postgraduate degree at Cambridge.
What_It_Covers: Full cost of studying at Cambridge, including tuition, living allowance, airfare.
Special_Requirements: Outstanding intellectual ability, leadership potential, commitment to improving others' lives.
Notes: Separate application required in addition to the University application.

Description: For students from low and middle-income Commonwealth countries to study in the UK.
What_It_Covers: Approved airfare, tuition fees, stipend, thesis grant.
Special_Requirements: Citizen of a Commonwealth country, permanent resident in a developing Commonwealth country.
Notes: Must be unable to afford to study in the UK without this scholarship.

Description: For international students who demonstrate academic excellence, social engagement, and conservative political alignment.
Special_Requirements: Above-average grades, Christian social values, political engagement
Notes: For students aligned with conservative Christian democratic values.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Supports outstanding students and young professionals in STEM and medical fields for study, research, or projects.

Special_Requirements: Citizen of a country with Bayer presence, outstanding academic record, project proposal
Notes: Focus on innovation and application of science for a better quality of life.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: For highly qualified professionals from developing countries to study in Germany and contribute to development in their home countries.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, monthly stipend, travel, health insurance, German language course
Special_Requirements: Several years of professional experience, commitment to development work in home country
Notes: Often requires a guarantee to return to the home country after studies.
Language_Requirements: English-taught programs: IELTS 6.0-6.5 or TOEFL 80-90. For German-taught programs: German C1 / DSH-2 / TestDaF 4x4.

Description: Need-blind admission and need-based financial aid for admitted international undergraduates.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, room, board based on calculated family need
Special_Requirements: Admitted to Cornell, demonstration of financial need
Notes: One of the few need-blind institutions for international students.

Description: A merit-based scholarship for first-year international undergraduate students.
Special_Requirements: Strong academic achievement, leadership qualities
Notes: Award is renewable for all four years of undergraduate study.

Description: A full-ride merit scholarship for study at both Duke University and the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, room, board, fees, plus summer experiences
Special_Requirements: Exceptional leadership, intellectual curiosity, strength of character
Notes: Unique program allowing students to take classes at both universities.

Description: Multiple merit-based scholarships for international students at undergraduate and postgraduate levels.
Special_Requirements: Outstanding academic achievement, offer of admission from the university
Notes: Many specific scholarships are available for different regions and subjects.

Scholarship_Name: Imperial College London President's PhD Scholarships
Description: Fully-funded scholarships for top PhD applicants from around the world.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition fees, stipend for living costs, consumables fund
Special_Requirements: First-class undergraduate degree, Master's degree (usually), strong research proposal

Scholarship_Name: University of Bristol Think Big Scholarships
Description: Merit-based scholarships for international undergraduate and postgraduate students.
Special_Requirements: Overseas student, applying for an eligible undergraduate or postgraduate program
Notes: Application requires answering motivational questions.

Description: For world-class doctoral students to study in Canada. One of Canada's most prestigious scholarships.
Feild_Of_Study: Health, Natural Sciences, Engineering, Social Sciences, Humanities
What_It_Covers: $50,000 CAD per year for three years
Special_Requirements: Academic excellence, research potential, leadership
Notes: Nomination by a Canadian university is required. Cannot apply directly.

Scholarship_Name: University of Toronto International Scholar Awards
Description: Merit-based awards for outstanding international students starting undergraduate studies.
Special_Requirements: Exceptional academic achievement, leadership, original thinking
Notes: Automatically considered upon application for admission. No separate application needed for most.

Description: U of T's most prestigious scholarship for international undergraduates, covering everything.
What_It_Covers: Full tuition, books, incidental fees, full residence support for four years
Special_Requirements: Exceptional academic achievement, creativity, leadership, school endorsement
Notes: Must be nominated by your current high school. Highly competitive.

Scholarship_Name: UBC International Leader of Tomorrow Award
Description: Need-and-merit-based award for international undergraduates who demonstrate leadership.
What_It_Covers: Award value proportional to financial need (covers tuition, fees, living costs)

Notes: Requires a separate application in addition to the admission application.

Description: Merit-based entrance scholarships for incoming international undergraduate students.
Special_Requirements: Top academic standing, admission to McGill
Notes: Most scholarships are automatic; no separate application needed.

Description: Various scholarships and awards for incoming international undergraduate students.
Special_Requirements: Academic excellence (90%+ average often required)
Notes: Check specific faculty pages for detailed opportunities and deadlines.

Description: Merit-based scholarships for new international students entering Humber College.
Special_Requirements: Academic merit, admission to Humber College
Notes: Applicants are automatically considered for most entrance awards.

Description: Merit-based scholarships for eligible international students entering undergraduate programs.

Notes: Most awards require no separate application—students are automatically considered.

Description: Automatic entrance scholarships for talented international undergraduate students.

Description: Fully-funded scholarships for students from developing countries to study in Australia and contribute to their home country's development.

Description: Merit-based scholarships for high-achieving international students at undergraduate and graduate levels.

Description: Merit-based scholarship for high-achieving international students at Australia's national university.

Notes: Competitive scholarship based on academic merit.

Description: Financed by the Dutch Ministry of Education and Dutch research universities to attract international students.

What_It_Covers: Full tuition fees, travel, visa, accommodation, insurance

Description: Awards for talented international students to pursue Bachelor's or Master's degrees at Utrecht University.

Notes: Highly competitive. Separate scholarship application required.

Description: For excellent international students from outside the EEA applying to Bachelor or Master programs.

Scholarship_Name: TU Delft Justus & Louise van Effen Scholarship

Description: For excellent students from non-EU/EEA countries applying for a graduate program.

Description: For talented non-EEA students to pursue English-taught Master's degrees.

Description: For excellent non-EU students in Master's programs at the University of Amsterdam.

Description: For talented international students in Master's programs. Covers tuition and provides allowance.

Scholarship_Name: Swedish Institute Scholarships for Global Professionals

Description: Merit-based scholarships for top academic students from outside the EU/EEA.

Description: For fee-paying international students pursuing Master's programs at Chalmers.

Description: For fee-paying international students admitted to Master's or Bachelor's programs.

Description: For outstanding international students applying to Master's programs.

Description: For high-achieving international students paying tuition fees.

Description: For talented students applying to Master's programs at MDU.

Notes: Automatic consideration with program application.

Description: For fee-paying international students in Master's programs.

Description: For excellent international students from outside the EU/EEA to study Master's programs.

Description: For non-EU/EEA students applying to Master's programmes at Aalto University.

Notes: Scholarships are awarded based on academic merit.

Description: For international students required to pay tuition fees in Bachelor's and Master's programmes.

Description: For non-EU/EEA students studying in Master's programmes.

Description: For doctoral level studies and research at Finnish universities.

Description: For non-EU/EEA students pursuing Master's degrees at LUT University.

Description: For students liable to pay tuition fees in Master's programmes.

Description: For international students required to pay tuition fees in Master's programmes.

Description: For fee-paying students in Master's programmes at Hanken.

Description: For talented non-EU/EEA students applying for Master's degrees.

Description: For non-EU/EEA students in Master's programmes at one of Europe's top business schools.

Description: For non-EU/EEA students in Master's programmes in IT and digital design.

Description: For highly qualified non-EU/EEA students in Master's programmes.

Description: For non-EU/EEA students in Master's programmes at SDU.

Description: Limited scholarships for highly qualified international Masters students.

Description: Scholarships for international Masters students at Norway's largest university.

Description: Limited funding for international students at the University of Bergen.

Description: For international students in Masters programs.

Description: For international students in Masters programs in Northern Norway.

Description: For top international students at Sciences Po university, outside of the EU.
